title: An0n's Playground
description: Astra's vannila+ pack featuring Create, DH, TACZ, and enhanced worldgen. Tested on multiple platforms.
body:
## Astra's Playground

  Astra's Vanilla+ leisure pack featuring [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), [tacz](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero), [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) and enhanced worldgen.

### Attention
For server-side packs Neoforge should be installed manually via [the neoforge installer](https://neoforged.net/). As server packs(marked with "S") are usually released alongside client packs(marked with "N" for Neoforge), you can refer to client pack for the specific Neoforge version number required for the server.

### Core features
**Vanilla parity**: As few new blocks/mechanisms as possible, meaning vanilla players will have no trouble when they come and play together.

**Enhanced worldgen**: [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) & [tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) combo overhauls worldgen, with [YUNG's](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG/mods) structures, [CTOV](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village), [t&t](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers), [Dungeons arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise) for some extra challenge. This pack is for exploring.

**Irredundant Optimization**: Selected optimization mods make for acceptible performance on most machines, while keeping the modlist reaosnably short. Server packs available with client-only mods removed.

**QoL features**: Full set of QoL mods. Life is hard already.

**Cross-platform compatibility**: Built and tested on both Windows and MacOS systems. Some shaders may not work on MacOS, but gameplay should be fine.
